Class Country

java.lang.Object
org.atlanmod.risk.Country
public class Country extends Object
Allows the creation of org.atlanmod.risk.Risk org.atlanmod.risk.Country objects.
Version:
Alpha
Author:
Ted Mader

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    addAdjacencies(List<Country> adjacencies)
    Used only when contstructing the country object, it should not be called after the board is initialized

    List<Country>

    Returns a list of the country objects that are adjacent to this country on the baord

    getArmies()
    Returns the number of armies currently stationed in this country

    Returns the player object who currently occupies the country

    Used to set the number of armies currently stationed in this country
    void

    When a player conquers a country the player object is set as the occupant of the country
